svg.title: Cloud LLM vs Local LLM memory allocation comparison
svg.desc: Side-by-side structural diagram comparing GPU memory layout: Cloud uses isolated per-session VRAM regions across distributed GPUs with elastic scaling; Local uses a single shared VRAM/unified-memory pool with KV eviction to CPU/SSD under pressure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How much VRAM do model weights occupy during LLM inference? What is tensor parallelism?')
sendPrompt('How much VRAM do model weights occupy during LLM inference? What is the difference from cloud deployment?')
sendPrompt('What does a KV cache contain, and why does each cloud session get fully isolated VRAM?')
sendPrompt('What does a KV cache contain, and why does each cloud session get fully isolated VRAM?')
sendPrompt('How does cloud LLM scale to handle many concurrent sessions — what happens when GPU VRAM fills up?')
g.text: Sessions C … N · each fully isolated

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a local LLM share VRAM across multiple concurrent sessions?')
sendPrompt('How does a local LLM share VRAM across multiple concurrent sessions?')
sendPrompt('What happens when local LLM VRAM fills up with multiple sessions — how does KV eviction work and what is the performance penalty?')
sendPrompt('What are activation buffers in LLM inference — how large are they, when are they allocated, and when are they freed?')
sendPrompt('How do activation buffers work in local multi-session LLM — are sessions processed sequentially or in parallel?')
g.text: Shared · one session at a time

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the logit buffer and token sampling buffer in LLM inference — how large is it and how long does it live?')
sendPrompt('What is the logit buffer and token sampling buffer in LLM inference — how large is it and how long does it live?')
sendPrompt('How does cloud LLM use CPU RAM for request queuing and scheduling across GPU nodes?')
sendPrompt('What is prefix caching in cloud LLM inference, how does it reduce TTFT, and where is it stored?')
sendPrompt('How does KV cache eviction to CPU RAM work in local LLM inference — what is the latency penalty?')
sendPrompt('How are sessions offloaded to SSD in local LLM inference — what triggers it and how is it managed by vLLM or llama.cpp?')

svg.text: Sessions isolated · scale by adding GPU nodes
Shared pool · evict / swap on memory pressure
Memory region legend · click any box to explore
